scope: Actual-LI layer-2 compressed dKV ScatterAdd reducer for sparse MLA backward, materialized-probs diagnostic contract.

code.kernel_contract: prepack valid (token, selected-slot) rows by tile-local compressed group; one CTA owns one segment and emits one reduced full-D dKV row by global atomic add

s4096_thread512_check.read: Increasing CTA threads from 256 to 512 regressed, so the S4096 failure is not caused by one extra D loop per thread.

read: The prepacked segment contract validates the intended ScatterAdd grouping: reduced global writes are correct and cheap enough at S512. At S4096, however, one segment-owned scalar CTA recomputes the H64 contribution math too slowly. This means grouping alone is not enough; the next viable branch must preserve query-major/MFMA contribution math and add tile-local grouped/segmented accumulation before global dKV writes.

keep: route pack plus segment metadata contract
one reduced dKV row per tile-local compressed-group segment as the Scatter target
S128/S512 parity artifacts as correctness smoke for segment ordering
reject: one CTA per segment full-D scalar contribution recompute as the S4096 production shape
thread-count-only tuning of the scalar segment CTA
decision.next_gate: Beat S4096 sparse atomic dKV wall 8.80629825592041 ms while preserving the 23.813x modeled write reduction.

commands: ssh do-sonle5-mi350-gpu 'docker run --rm --entrypoint python --device=/dev/kfd --device=/dev/dri --group-add video --ipc=host --network=host --cap-add=SYS_PTRACE --security-opt seccomp=unconfined -e HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 -e PYTHONPATH=/workspace/tools/dsv4_runtime_probe:/workspace/sources/wip/torchtitan -e TORCH_EXTENSIONS_DIR=/workspace/run_artifacts/torch_extensions -v /scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527:/workspace -w /workspace onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori tools/dsv4_runtime_probe/probe_compressed_dkv_segmented_hip_accumulator.py --seq-len 128 --layer-id 2 --contract-rung 32x256_d16_smoke --include-tile-segment --skip-scalar-candidate --skip-pytorch-reference-timing --warmup-iters 1 --timed-iters 3 --summary-path /workspace/run_artifacts/actual_li_tile_segment_full_d_scalar_s128_layer2_t32k256_20260603.json --json'
